TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Son lilien Tintosi == Son lilien (Inkiris: Lillian R. Dickson, 1901 miheca 1 folad 29 romi'ad – 1983 miheca 1 folad 14 romi'ad), o nai Minnesota no Amilika a sinkiwsi Kristo ciwlo kiwkay. o fafahi ni Son Yakop (James Ira Dickson) sinkiwsi cingra, itiya i 1952 miheca patireng to sa'ayaway syakay sakalemed citodongay – Caytanghocin Kristokiw sapaloma kikingkay . Kasofocan I 1927 miheca, ci Son lilien (Lillian R. Dickson) aci Son Yakop (James Ira Dickson) mararamod ta tayra i Taywan misinting, 'ayaw kalaloodan no Taypinyang, o fafahi no sinkiwsi ko kalita'ang, mipadama to fa'inay ci Son Yakopan mipatenakay tayal. Saka 2 kalaloodan no hekal, cingra aci Son Yakop ma'epec no nai Taywan Sotofo miliyas to Taywan tayra i katimol Amilika nikowanan no Inkiris a Guyana mitingto. I 1947 miheca, patiko haca tayni Taywan ci Son lilien (Lillian R. Dickson). Nengneng han ko naikoran no kalalood ko Taywan adihay ko makari'angay o sasalofen, nanoya pakifafahi no Sinkiwsi ko pidemak to isingan, midama patado ato mikiwiko a patado ko demak . I 1948 miheca tangasa 1950 mihecaan, ci Son lilien ato MCC misakapot to Santi mirakatay isingan i Taywan, micomod i niyaro' no yincumin a patado, mikapotay ira ci Lu Chunchang foksi, MCC a singkiwsi Gao Ganlin aci Sie Wei ising . I 1949 miheca, micomod cingra i Lesen padipotan (Liawyangyin), i 1950 mihecaan malacalay ci Pai Sinte ((1909-1979, Signe Berg), Du Aiming, "Poli akong" Xu Binnuo, "Mama no maepiay" Picass a singkiwsi tayra i Lesen padipotan, padamso to sapipaising ato sakaira a kinaira . I 1951 miheca, o pipadama no sokay i New York to roma kitakit mapohaway kikingkay i Amilika, ci Son lilien ato 'alomanay macodahay faloco' no icowacowaay niyaro' a tamdaw mapolong patireng to Taywan mapohaway palowadan (Congcienyin), itiya milesap patado to mapohaway tayal . I 1952 miheca, patireng cingra to Kristokiw sapoloma kapot, pakayni tonini citodongay micowat to syakay padamaan tayal; toya miheca Lesen pakamoro'an a Hansen adadaay patireng to Senwang kiwkay . 1953 miheca, patireng cingra to parihadayan loma' saki Hansen adadaay kaemangay, saka serer eca ka denga katalawan adada no mato'asay; toya mihecaan itira pipadama no patirengay tamdaw ci Pop Piers i hekal pafaloco'an, patireng t okaemangay loma' pakamaro'an no awaayay ko pinokayan wawa . I 1955 miheca, manengneng ningra ko kacango'ot no isingan i kasaniyaro', orasaka itira i Poli no Nantu patireng to Kristokiw Santi paterongan isingan, onian koya 'ayaway no Poli Kristokiw isingan. Saan malesap ko haykikak i kasaniyaro', orasaka sakatosa miheca padadoedo sa i Poli no Nantu, Sankowang (Ciyamin) niyaro', Sinko no Posong, Takofan no Posong, Sinpi no Pintong patireng to pinga'ayan to haykikak adadaay, miadah to ci adadaay to haykikak a yincumin . I 1957 miheca, patireng cingra i Sincuang to Aysin Yuyoyin, padipotan to kasahira mangalayay to sadama a kaemangay; toya mihecaan patireng to saki mapilihay tamdaw to Sida'itay mapilihay loma' (Ceay cecya), ato micomod i pirofoan sapikehar to marofoay tayal. Roma miheca, patireng cingra to 25 kahiceraan i lawacay no riyar sa'etal padamsoay to miloko, palilam to miloko ato Fitamin sapatongal to 'angil (hared); patireng haca to Yikong pitilidan sapatodong to fa'inayan no yincumin ato fafahiya kangkofo pitilidan no yincumin fafahiyan, padamso to sakacifana' kiwiko pinanaman . I 1960 miheca, patireng cingra i Taypi to kaemangay loma' pakamaro'an to mirakarakay kaemangay; patodong to saki yincumin i Hualiensi, Takofan no Posong, Taytongsi, Sinpi no Pintong, Poli no Nantu to Maliya pipasofocan, padamso to kanga'ayan masofoc yincumin a fafahiyan kaitiraan, toya miheca mahaceng ko no wa'ay a adada, milicay ci Wang Cinhe aci Sie Wei isingan, itira i Pimen no Taynan patireng to Pimen caay pa'aca isingan (Sida'itay fawahan), ci Son lilien ko pasadakay to payso sadama sakadademak nonini a isingan saka, ci Wang Cinhe aci Sie Wei isingan ko minengnengay to adadaay, ira ko 25 mihecaan na mimisitapang ko paising a patado, ci Son lilien, ci Wang Cinhe aci Sie Wei pakayni to saki 'ayaway wa'ay a adada pipaisingan masowal "Tie sanciaw" han ko pangangan cangraan . Caay ka dengan o wa'ay a adada pipaisingan, patorodan ni Wang Cinhe ising ci Son lilienan, padama to adadaay "kadademakan tayal", saka ira no adadaay mikared to sikal saka'orip . I 1962 miheca, milaheci cingra patireng i Taywan to Caytang hocing Kristokiw sapaloma kikingkay, mala o sarakatay i Taywan to sakalemad no syakay sakapot; toya mihecaan patireng cingra to patokaran pinanaman, padama to sapipadoedoaw no yincumin a mitilid . I 1965 miheca, patireng haca cingra i Wanki no Sinpisi to Wanli pala (Aniniay piharatengan Son lilien pala), o kasa'opoan no kaemangay wawa saki kaciherangan pirarakatan. I 1968 miheca, midotoc cingra to nisafaloco'an ni Son Yakop Sinkiwsi (1967 miheca mapatay), patireng to maromromay roma kitakit Sintokay, misatapang saki yincumin no Taywan tayra i Nanyo misinting ato kiwiko a tayal . I 1970 miheca, itira cingra i Kalingkopatireng to paloma'an no mamasofoc a ina, kaitiraan no sakanga'ay maro' ato misofoc i caayay ka ciramod cipoyapoyay fafahiyan. I 1983 miheca, i katayalan ho ningra a mapatay, malakapot to fa'inay ci Son Yakop foksian maleda' itira i Taywan sinkakoyin, oya Sapaloma kikingkay o kadafo ci Tang Huanan foksi sinkiwsi ato wawa to fafahiya ci Malian ko micadaay . Laloma'an Wawa to fafahiyan: Malian (Marilyn Ruth Tank,1932/07/13-2021/12/16 ), masofoc i Taypi, saka tosa a wawa . Nahani mala'a'isidan ko mama ci Son Yakop i Taypi sinkakko itiya, kaemangan ho maro' i Tansui, Suanglien no Taypi a kaitiraan . I 1940 miheca kalalood no saka 2 malahakelong to mato'asay minokay tayra i Amilika, itira to milaheci misawad to Kawcong ato daykako . I 1954 miheca, misawad i Wheaton kakoyin ci Malian toya miheca minokay tayni Taypi, midama to ina ci Son Lilienan i Sapaloma kikingkay patado to tayal . Kalingko, citodong to Sapaloma kikaingkay i Kalingko patado to tayal cangra mararamod, halo Sapaloma kikingkay "Maliya pasofocan", "Haykikako pinga'ayan", "Padamaay ina kakko", "Kangkokfo pitilidan", "Pinanaman kamaro'an", micowat i Kalingko Kristo kiw kiwkay . I 1983 miheca mapatay ci Son Lilien, o fa'inay ci Tang Huanan foksi to ko mirepetay saka 2 kakeridan, hatatosa sa a citodong to Sapaloma kikingkay a tayal . I 1992 miheca misawad ci Malian nai Sapaloma kikingkay, malakapot to fa'inay minokay tayra i Amilika. Nawhani mahirateng ko Taywan saka, i 'ayaw no 1997 miheca kinapinapina misatikotiko tayni Taywan midama to Sapaloma kikingkay to patado a tayal, itira i Chicago ko aro' imatrini . Pinengnengan 10劉慧華,<孫理蓮(LillianR.Dickson)與基督教芥菜種會(TheMustardSeed,Inc.1954-)>, ,1987.
S.PHON: == so~un ɾiɾiən tinto~usi == so~un ɾiɾiən (inkiris: ɾiɾɾian r. ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), o~u nai minnəso~uta no~u amiɾika a sinkiwsi kristo~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj. o~u fafaħi ni so~un jako~up (*aməs ira ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un) sinkiwsi ʦiŋra, itija i **** miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u saʡajawaj sjakaj sakaɾəməɬ~ɮ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj * ʦajtaŋħo~uʦin kristo~ukiw sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj . kaso~ufo~uʦan i **** miħəʦa, ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən (ɾiɾɾian r. ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un) aʦi so~un jako~up (*aməs ira ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un) mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ta tajra i tajwan misintiŋ, ʡajaw kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u tajpinjaŋ, o~u fafaħi no~u sinkiwsi ko~u kaɾitaʡaŋ, mipaɬ~ɮama to~u faʡinaj ʦi so~un jako~upan mipatənakaj tajaɾ. saka * kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ħəkaɾ, ʦiŋra aʦi so~un jako~up maʡəpəʦ no~u nai tajwan so~uto~ufo~u miɾijas to~u tajwan tajra i katimo~uɾ amiɾika niko~uwanan no~u inkiris a *o~u~ujana mitiŋto~u. i **** miħəʦa, patiko~u ħaʦa tajni tajwan ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən (ɾiɾɾian r. ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un). nəŋnəŋ ħan ko~u naiko~uran no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u tajwan aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u makariʡaŋaj o~u sasaɾo~ufən, nano~uja pakifafaħi no~u sinkiwsi ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u isiŋan, miɬ~ɮama pataɬ~ɮo~u ato~u mikiwiko~u a pataɬ~ɮo~u ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak . i **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦaan, ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən ato~u mʦʦ misakapo~ut to~u santi mirakataj isiŋan i tajwan, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin a pataɬ~ɮo~u, mikapo~utaj ira ʦi ɾo~u~u ʦħo~u~unʦħaŋ fo~uksi, mʦʦ a siŋkiwsi *ao~u *anɾin aʦi siə wəi isiŋ . i **** miħəʦa, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra i ɾəsən paɬ~ɮipo~utan (ɾiawjaŋjin), i **** miħəʦaan maɾaʦaɾaj ʦi pai sintə ((****-****, si*nə b~b~vər*), ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimiŋ, "po~uɾi ako~uŋ" xo~u~u b~b~vinno~u~uo~u, "mama no~u maəpiaj" piʦass a siŋkiwsi tajra i ɾəsən paɬ~ɮipo~utan, paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u sapipaisiŋ ato~u sakaira a kinaira . i **** miħəʦa, o~u pipaɬ~ɮama no~u so~ukaj i nəw jo~urk to~u ro~uma kitakit mapo~uħawaj kikiŋkaj i amiɾika, ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən ato~u ʡaɾo~umanaj maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj nijaro~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw mapo~uɾo~uŋ patirəŋ to~u tajwan mapo~uħawaj paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan (ʦo~uŋʦiənjin), itija miɾəsap pataɬ~ɮo~u to~u mapo~uħawaj tajaɾ . i **** miħəʦa, patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u kristo~ukiw sapo~uɾo~uma kapo~ut, pakajni to~unini ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miʦo~uwat to~u sjakaj paɬ~ɮamaan tajaɾ; to~uja miħəʦa ɾəsən pakamo~uro~uʡan a ħansən aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj patirəŋ to~u sənwaŋ kiwkaj . **** miħəʦa, patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u pariħaɬ~ɮajan ɾo~umaʡ saki ħansən aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj kaəmaŋaj, saka sərər əʦa ka ɬ~ɮəŋa kataɾawan aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u mato~uʡasaj; to~uja miħəʦaan itira pipaɬ~ɮama no~u patirəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi po~up piərs i ħəkaɾ pafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan, patirəŋ t o~ukaəmaŋaj ɾo~umaʡ pakamaro~uʡan no~u awaajaj ko~u pino~ukajan wawa . i **** miħəʦa, manəŋnəŋ niŋra ko~u kaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut no~u isiŋan i kasanijaro~uʡ, o~urasaka itira i po~uɾi no~u nanto~u~u patirəŋ to~u kristo~ukiw santi patəro~uŋan isiŋan, o~unian ko~uja ʡajawaj no~u po~uɾi kristo~ukiw isiŋan. saan maɾəsap ko~u ħajkikak i kasanijaro~uʡ, o~urasaka sakato~usa miħəʦa paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sa i po~uɾi no~u nanto~u~u, sanko~uwaŋ (ʦijamin) nijaro~uʡ, sinko~u no~u po~uso~uŋ, tako~ufan no~u po~uso~uŋ, sinpi no~u pinto~uŋ patirəŋ to~u piŋaʡajan to~u ħajkikak aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u ʦi aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u ħajkikak a jinʦo~u~umin . i **** miħəʦa, patirəŋ ʦiŋra i sinʦo~u~uaŋ to~u ajsin jo~u~ujo~ujin, paɬ~ɮipo~utan to~u kasaħira maŋaɾajaj to~u saɬ~ɮama a kaəmaŋaj; to~uja miħəʦaan patirəŋ to~u saki mapiɾiħaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u siɬ~ɮaʡitaj mapiɾiħaj ɾo~umaʡ (ʦəaj ʦəʦja), ato~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i piro~ufo~uan sapikəħar to~u maro~ufo~uaj tajaɾ. ro~uma miħəʦa, patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u ** kaħiʦəraan i ɾawaʦaj no~u rijar saʡətaɾ paɬ~ɮamso~uaj to~u miɾo~uko~u, paɾiɾam to~u miɾo~uko~u ato~u fitamin sapato~uŋaɾ to~u ʡaŋiɾ (ħarəɬ~ɮ); patirəŋ ħaʦa to~u jiko~uŋ pitiɾiɬ~ɮan sapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u faʡinajan no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u fafaħija kaŋko~ufo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin fafaħijan, paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u sakaʦifanaʡ kiwiko~u pinanaman . i **** miħəʦa, patirəŋ ʦiŋra i tajpi to~u kaəmaŋaj ɾo~umaʡ pakamaro~uʡan to~u mirakarakaj kaəmaŋaj; pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u saki jinʦo~u~umin i ħo~u~uaɾiənsi, tako~ufan no~u po~uso~uŋ, tajto~uŋsi, sinpi no~u pinto~uŋ, po~uɾi no~u nanto~u~u to~u maɾija pipaso~ufo~uʦan, paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u kaŋaʡajan maso~ufo~uʦ jinʦo~u~umin a fafaħijan kaitiraan, to~uja miħəʦa maħaʦəŋ ko~u no~u waʡaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, miɾiʦaj ʦi waŋ ʦinħə aʦi siə wəi isiŋan, itira i pimən no~u tajnan patirəŋ to~u pimən ʦaaj paʡaʦa isiŋan (siɬ~ɮaʡitaj fawaħan), ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən ko~u pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~u pajso~u saɬ~ɮama sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~unini a isiŋan saka, ʦi waŋ ʦinħə aʦi siə wəi isiŋan ko~u minəŋnəŋaj to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan na mimisitapaŋ ko~u paisiŋ a pataɬ~ɮo~u, ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən, ʦi waŋ ʦinħə aʦi siə wəi pakajni to~u saki ʡajawaj waʡaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa pipaisiŋan maso~uwaɾ "tiə sanʦiaw" ħan ko~u paŋaŋan ʦaŋraan . ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u waʡaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa pipaisiŋan, pato~uro~uɬ~ɮan ni waŋ ʦinħə isiŋ ʦi so~un ɾiɾiənan, paɬ~ɮama to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj "kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan tajaɾ", saka ira no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj mikarəɬ~ɮ to~u sikaɾ sakaʡo~urip . i **** miħəʦa, miɾaħəʦi ʦiŋra patirəŋ i tajwan to~u ʦajtaŋ ħo~uʦiŋ kristo~ukiw sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj, maɾa o~u sarakataj i tajwan to~u sakaɾəmaɬ~ɮ no~u sjakaj sakapo~ut; to~uja miħəʦaan patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u pato~ukaran pinanaman, paɬ~ɮama to~u sapipaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaw no~u jinʦo~u~umin a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ . i **** miħəʦa, patirəŋ ħaʦa ʦiŋra i wanki no~u sinpisi to~u wanɾi paɾa (aniniaj piħaratəŋan so~un ɾiɾiən paɾa), o~u kasaʡo~upo~uan no~u kaəmaŋaj wawa saki kaʦiħəraŋan pirarakatan. i **** miħəʦa, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ʦiŋra to~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan ni so~un jako~up sinkiwsi (**** miħəʦa mapataj), patirəŋ to~u maro~umro~umaj ro~uma kitakit sinto~ukaj, misatapaŋ saki jinʦo~u~umin no~u tajwan tajra i nanjo~u misintiŋ ato~u kiwiko~u a tajaɾ . i **** miħəʦa, itira ʦiŋra i kaɾiŋko~upatirəŋ to~u paɾo~umaʡan no~u mamaso~ufo~uʦ a ina, kaitiraan no~u sakaŋaʡaj maro~uʡ ato~u miso~ufo~uʦ i ʦaajaj ka ʦiramo~uɬ~ɮ ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj fafaħijan. i **** miħəʦa, i katajaɾan ħo~u niŋra a mapataj, maɾakapo~ut to~u faʡinaj ʦi so~un jako~up fo~uksian maɾəɬ~ɮaʡ itira i tajwan sinkako~ujin, o~uja sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj o~u kaɬ~ɮafo~u ʦi taŋ ħo~u~uanan fo~uksi sinkiwsi ato~u wawa to~u fafaħija ʦi maɾian ko~u miʦaɬ~ɮaaj . ɾaɾo~umaʡan wawa to~u fafaħijan: maɾian (mariɾjn ro~u~utħ tank,****/**/**-****/**/** ), maso~ufo~uʦ i tajpi, saka to~usa a wawa . naħani maɾaʡaʡisiɬ~ɮan ko~u mama ʦi so~un jako~up i tajpi sinkakko~u itija, kaəmaŋan ħo~u maro~uʡ i tanso~u~ui, so~u~uaŋɾiən no~u tajpi a kaitiraan . i **** miħəʦa kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u saka * maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ to~u mato~uʡasaj mino~ukaj tajra i amiɾika, itira to~u miɾaħəʦi misawaɬ~ɮ to~u kawʦo~uŋ ato~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u . i **** miħəʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ i wħəato~un kako~ujin ʦi maɾian to~uja miħəʦa mino~ukaj tajni tajpi, miɬ~ɮama to~u ina ʦi so~un ɾiɾiənan i sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj pataɬ~ɮo~u to~u tajaɾ . kaɾiŋko~u, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sapaɾo~uma kikaiŋkaj i kaɾiŋko~u pataɬ~ɮo~u to~u tajaɾ ʦaŋra mararamo~uɬ~ɮ, ħaɾo~u sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj "maɾija paso~ufo~uʦan", "ħajkikako~u piŋaʡajan", "paɬ~ɮamaaj ina kakko~u", "kaŋko~ukfo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan", "pinanaman kamaro~uʡan", miʦo~uwat i kaɾiŋko~u kristo~u kiw kiwkaj . i **** miħəʦa mapataj ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən, o~u faʡinaj ʦi taŋ ħo~u~uanan fo~uksi to~u ko~u mirəpətaj saka * kakəriɬ~ɮan, ħatato~usa sa a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj a tajaɾ . i **** miħəʦa misawaɬ~ɮ ʦi maɾian nai sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj, maɾakapo~ut to~u faʡinaj mino~ukaj tajra i amiɾika. nawħani maħiratəŋ ko~u tajwan saka, i ʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦa kinapinapina misatiko~utiko~u tajni tajwan miɬ~ɮama to~u sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj to~u pataɬ~ɮo~u a tajaɾ, itira i ʦħiʦa*o~u ko~u aro~uʡ imatrini . pinəŋnəŋan *****,<***(ɾiɾɾianr.ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un)********(tħəmo~u~ustarɬ~ɮsəəɬ~ɮ,inʦ.****-)>, ,****.
S.FORM: == Son lilien Tintosi == Son lilien (Inkiris: Lillian R. Dickson, 1901 miheca 1 folad 29 romi'ad – 1983 miheca 1 folad 14 romi'ad), o nai Minnesota no Amilika a sinkiwsi Kristo ciwlo kiwkay. o fafahi ni Son Yakop (James Ira Dickson) sinkiwsi cingra, itiya i 1952 miheca patireng to sa'ayaway syakay sakalemed citodongay – Caytanghocin Kristokiw sapaloma kikingkay . Kasofocan I 1927 miheca, ci Son lilien (Lillian R. Dickson) aci Son Yakop (James Ira Dickson) mararamod ta tayra i Taywan misinting, 'ayaw kalaloodan no Taypinyang, o fafahi no sinkiwsi ko kalita'ang, mipadama to fa'inay ci Son Yakopan mipatenakay tayal. Saka 2 kalaloodan no hekal, cingra aci Son Yakop ma'epec no nai Taywan Sotofo miliyas to Taywan tayra i katimol Amilika nikowanan no Inkiris a Guyana mitingto. I 1947 miheca, patiko haca tayni Taywan ci Son lilien (Lillian R. Dickson). Nengneng han ko naikoran no kalalood ko Taywan adihay ko makari'angay o sasalofen, nanoya pakifafahi no Sinkiwsi ko pidemak to isingan, midama patado ato mikiwiko a patado ko demak . I 1948 miheca tangasa 1950 mihecaan, ci Son lilien ato MCC misakapot to Santi mirakatay isingan i Taywan, micomod i niyaro' no yincumin a patado, mikapotay ira ci Lu Chunchang foksi, MCC a singkiwsi Gao Ganlin aci Sie Wei ising . I 1949 miheca, micomod cingra i Lesen padipotan (Liawyangyin), i 1950 mihecaan malacalay ci Pai Sinte ((1909-1979, Signe Berg), Du Aiming, "Poli akong" Xu Binnuo, "Mama no maepiay" Picass a singkiwsi tayra i Lesen padipotan, padamso to sapipaising ato sakaira a kinaira . I 1951 miheca, o pipadama no sokay i New York to roma kitakit mapohaway kikingkay i Amilika, ci Son lilien ato 'alomanay macodahay faloco' no icowacowaay niyaro' a tamdaw mapolong patireng to Taywan mapohaway palowadan (Congcienyin), itiya milesap patado to mapohaway tayal . I 1952 miheca, patireng cingra to Kristokiw sapoloma kapot, pakayni tonini citodongay micowat to syakay padamaan tayal; toya miheca Lesen pakamoro'an a Hansen adadaay patireng to Senwang kiwkay . 1953 miheca, patireng cingra to parihadayan loma' saki Hansen adadaay kaemangay, saka serer eca ka denga katalawan adada no mato'asay; toya mihecaan itira pipadama no patirengay tamdaw ci Pop Piers i hekal pafaloco'an, patireng t okaemangay loma' pakamaro'an no awaayay ko pinokayan wawa . I 1955 miheca, manengneng ningra ko kacango'ot no isingan i kasaniyaro', orasaka itira i Poli no Nantu patireng to Kristokiw Santi paterongan isingan, onian koya 'ayaway no Poli Kristokiw isingan. Saan malesap ko haykikak i kasaniyaro', orasaka sakatosa miheca padadoedo sa i Poli no Nantu, Sankowang (Ciyamin) niyaro', Sinko no Posong, Takofan no Posong, Sinpi no Pintong patireng to pinga'ayan to haykikak adadaay, miadah to ci adadaay to haykikak a yincumin . I 1957 miheca, patireng cingra i Sincuang to Aysin Yuyoyin, padipotan to kasahira mangalayay to sadama a kaemangay; toya mihecaan patireng to saki mapilihay tamdaw to Sida'itay mapilihay loma' (Ceay cecya), ato micomod i pirofoan sapikehar to marofoay tayal. Roma miheca, patireng cingra to 25 kahiceraan i lawacay no riyar sa'etal padamsoay to miloko, palilam to miloko ato Fitamin sapatongal to 'angil (hared); patireng haca to Yikong pitilidan sapatodong to fa'inayan no yincumin ato fafahiya kangkofo pitilidan no yincumin fafahiyan, padamso to sakacifana' kiwiko pinanaman . I 1960 miheca, patireng cingra i Taypi to kaemangay loma' pakamaro'an to mirakarakay kaemangay; patodong to saki yincumin i Hualiensi, Takofan no Posong, Taytongsi, Sinpi no Pintong, Poli no Nantu to Maliya pipasofocan, padamso to kanga'ayan masofoc yincumin a fafahiyan kaitiraan, toya miheca mahaceng ko no wa'ay a adada, milicay ci Wang Cinhe aci Sie Wei isingan, itira i Pimen no Taynan patireng to Pimen caay pa'aca isingan (Sida'itay fawahan), ci Son lilien ko pasadakay to payso sadama sakadademak nonini a isingan saka, ci Wang Cinhe aci Sie Wei isingan ko minengnengay to adadaay, ira ko 25 mihecaan na mimisitapang ko paising a patado, ci Son lilien, ci Wang Cinhe aci Sie Wei pakayni to saki 'ayaway wa'ay a adada pipaisingan masowal "Tie sanciaw" han ko pangangan cangraan . Caay ka dengan o wa'ay a adada pipaisingan, patorodan ni Wang Cinhe ising ci Son lilienan, padama to adadaay "kadademakan tayal", saka ira no adadaay mikared to sikal saka'orip . I 1962 miheca, milaheci cingra patireng i Taywan to Caytang hocing Kristokiw sapaloma kikingkay, mala o sarakatay i Taywan to sakalemad no syakay sakapot; toya mihecaan patireng cingra to patokaran pinanaman, padama to sapipadoedoaw no yincumin a mitilid . I 1965 miheca, patireng haca cingra i Wanki no Sinpisi to Wanli pala (Aniniay piharatengan Son lilien pala), o kasa'opoan no kaemangay wawa saki kaciherangan pirarakatan. I 1968 miheca, midotoc cingra to nisafaloco'an ni Son Yakop Sinkiwsi (1967 miheca mapatay), patireng to maromromay roma kitakit Sintokay, misatapang saki yincumin no Taywan tayra i Nanyo misinting ato kiwiko a tayal . I 1970 miheca, itira cingra i Kalingkopatireng to paloma'an no mamasofoc a ina, kaitiraan no sakanga'ay maro' ato misofoc i caayay ka ciramod cipoyapoyay fafahiyan. I 1983 miheca, i katayalan ho ningra a mapatay, malakapot to fa'inay ci Son Yakop foksian maleda' itira i Taywan sinkakoyin, oya Sapaloma kikingkay o kadafo ci Tang Huanan foksi sinkiwsi ato wawa to fafahiya ci Malian ko micadaay . Laloma'an Wawa to fafahiyan: Malian (Marilyn Ruth Tank,1932/07/13-2021/12/16 ), masofoc i Taypi, saka tosa a wawa . Nahani mala'a'isidan ko mama ci Son Yakop i Taypi sinkakko itiya, kaemangan ho maro' i Tansui, Suanglien no Taypi a kaitiraan . I 1940 miheca kalalood no saka 2 malahakelong to mato'asay minokay tayra i Amilika, itira to milaheci misawad to Kawcong ato daykako . I 1954 miheca, misawad i Wheaton kakoyin ci Malian toya miheca minokay tayni Taypi, midama to ina ci Son Lilienan i Sapaloma kikingkay patado to tayal . Kalingko, citodong to Sapaloma kikaingkay i Kalingko patado to tayal cangra mararamod, halo Sapaloma kikingkay "Maliya pasofocan", "Haykikako pinga'ayan", "Padamaay ina kakko", "Kangkokfo pitilidan", "Pinanaman kamaro'an", micowat i Kalingko Kristo kiw kiwkay . I 1983 miheca mapatay ci Son Lilien, o fa'inay ci Tang Huanan foksi to ko mirepetay saka 2 kakeridan, hatatosa sa a citodong to Sapaloma kikingkay a tayal . I 1992 miheca misawad ci Malian nai Sapaloma kikingkay, malakapot to fa'inay minokay tayra i Amilika. Nawhani mahirateng ko Taywan saka, i 'ayaw no 1997 miheca kinapinapina misatikotiko tayni Taywan midama to Sapaloma kikingkay to patado a tayal, itira i Chicago ko aro' imatrini . Pinengnengan 10劉慧華,<孫理蓮(LillianR.Dickson)與基督教芥菜種會(TheMustardSeed,Inc.1954-)>, ,1987.
S.PHON: == so~un ɾiɾiən tinto~usi == so~un ɾiɾiən (inkiris: ɾiɾɾian r. ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), o~u nai minnəso~uta no~u amiɾika a sinkiwsi kristo~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj. o~u fafaħi ni so~un jako~up (*aməs ira ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un) sinkiwsi ʦiŋra, itija i **** miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u saʡajawaj sjakaj sakaɾəməɬ~ɮ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj * ʦajtaŋħo~uʦin kristo~ukiw sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj . kaso~ufo~uʦan i **** miħəʦa, ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən (ɾiɾɾian r. ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un) aʦi so~un jako~up (*aməs ira ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un) mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ta tajra i tajwan misintiŋ, ʡajaw kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u tajpinjaŋ, o~u fafaħi no~u sinkiwsi ko~u kaɾitaʡaŋ, mipaɬ~ɮama to~u faʡinaj ʦi so~un jako~upan mipatənakaj tajaɾ. saka * kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ħəkaɾ, ʦiŋra aʦi so~un jako~up maʡəpəʦ no~u nai tajwan so~uto~ufo~u miɾijas to~u tajwan tajra i katimo~uɾ amiɾika niko~uwanan no~u inkiris a *o~u~ujana mitiŋto~u. i **** miħəʦa, patiko~u ħaʦa tajni tajwan ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən (ɾiɾɾian r. ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un). nəŋnəŋ ħan ko~u naiko~uran no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u tajwan aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u makariʡaŋaj o~u sasaɾo~ufən, nano~uja pakifafaħi no~u sinkiwsi ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u isiŋan, miɬ~ɮama pataɬ~ɮo~u ato~u mikiwiko~u a pataɬ~ɮo~u ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak . i **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦaan, ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən ato~u mʦʦ misakapo~ut to~u santi mirakataj isiŋan i tajwan, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin a pataɬ~ɮo~u, mikapo~utaj ira ʦi ɾo~u~u ʦħo~u~unʦħaŋ fo~uksi, mʦʦ a siŋkiwsi *ao~u *anɾin aʦi siə wəi isiŋ . i **** miħəʦa, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra i ɾəsən paɬ~ɮipo~utan (ɾiawjaŋjin), i **** miħəʦaan maɾaʦaɾaj ʦi pai sintə ((****-****, si*nə b~b~vər*), ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimiŋ, "po~uɾi ako~uŋ" xo~u~u b~b~vinno~u~uo~u, "mama no~u maəpiaj" piʦass a siŋkiwsi tajra i ɾəsən paɬ~ɮipo~utan, paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u sapipaisiŋ ato~u sakaira a kinaira . i **** miħəʦa, o~u pipaɬ~ɮama no~u so~ukaj i nəw jo~urk to~u ro~uma kitakit mapo~uħawaj kikiŋkaj i amiɾika, ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən ato~u ʡaɾo~umanaj maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj nijaro~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw mapo~uɾo~uŋ patirəŋ to~u tajwan mapo~uħawaj paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan (ʦo~uŋʦiənjin), itija miɾəsap pataɬ~ɮo~u to~u mapo~uħawaj tajaɾ . i **** miħəʦa, patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u kristo~ukiw sapo~uɾo~uma kapo~ut, pakajni to~unini ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miʦo~uwat to~u sjakaj paɬ~ɮamaan tajaɾ; to~uja miħəʦa ɾəsən pakamo~uro~uʡan a ħansən aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj patirəŋ to~u sənwaŋ kiwkaj . **** miħəʦa, patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u pariħaɬ~ɮajan ɾo~umaʡ saki ħansən aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj kaəmaŋaj, saka sərər əʦa ka ɬ~ɮəŋa kataɾawan aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u mato~uʡasaj; to~uja miħəʦaan itira pipaɬ~ɮama no~u patirəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi po~up piərs i ħəkaɾ pafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan, patirəŋ t o~ukaəmaŋaj ɾo~umaʡ pakamaro~uʡan no~u awaajaj ko~u pino~ukajan wawa . i **** miħəʦa, manəŋnəŋ niŋra ko~u kaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut no~u isiŋan i kasanijaro~uʡ, o~urasaka itira i po~uɾi no~u nanto~u~u patirəŋ to~u kristo~ukiw santi patəro~uŋan isiŋan, o~unian ko~uja ʡajawaj no~u po~uɾi kristo~ukiw isiŋan. saan maɾəsap ko~u ħajkikak i kasanijaro~uʡ, o~urasaka sakato~usa miħəʦa paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sa i po~uɾi no~u nanto~u~u, sanko~uwaŋ (ʦijamin) nijaro~uʡ, sinko~u no~u po~uso~uŋ, tako~ufan no~u po~uso~uŋ, sinpi no~u pinto~uŋ patirəŋ to~u piŋaʡajan to~u ħajkikak aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u ʦi aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u ħajkikak a jinʦo~u~umin . i **** miħəʦa, patirəŋ ʦiŋra i sinʦo~u~uaŋ to~u ajsin jo~u~ujo~ujin, paɬ~ɮipo~utan to~u kasaħira maŋaɾajaj to~u saɬ~ɮama a kaəmaŋaj; to~uja miħəʦaan patirəŋ to~u saki mapiɾiħaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u siɬ~ɮaʡitaj mapiɾiħaj ɾo~umaʡ (ʦəaj ʦəʦja), ato~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i piro~ufo~uan sapikəħar to~u maro~ufo~uaj tajaɾ. ro~uma miħəʦa, patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u ** kaħiʦəraan i ɾawaʦaj no~u rijar saʡətaɾ paɬ~ɮamso~uaj to~u miɾo~uko~u, paɾiɾam to~u miɾo~uko~u ato~u fitamin sapato~uŋaɾ to~u ʡaŋiɾ (ħarəɬ~ɮ); patirəŋ ħaʦa to~u jiko~uŋ pitiɾiɬ~ɮan sapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u faʡinajan no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u fafaħija kaŋko~ufo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin fafaħijan, paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u sakaʦifanaʡ kiwiko~u pinanaman . i **** miħəʦa, patirəŋ ʦiŋra i tajpi to~u kaəmaŋaj ɾo~umaʡ pakamaro~uʡan to~u mirakarakaj kaəmaŋaj; pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u saki jinʦo~u~umin i ħo~u~uaɾiənsi, tako~ufan no~u po~uso~uŋ, tajto~uŋsi, sinpi no~u pinto~uŋ, po~uɾi no~u nanto~u~u to~u maɾija pipaso~ufo~uʦan, paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u kaŋaʡajan maso~ufo~uʦ jinʦo~u~umin a fafaħijan kaitiraan, to~uja miħəʦa maħaʦəŋ ko~u no~u waʡaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, miɾiʦaj ʦi waŋ ʦinħə aʦi siə wəi isiŋan, itira i pimən no~u tajnan patirəŋ to~u pimən ʦaaj paʡaʦa isiŋan (siɬ~ɮaʡitaj fawaħan), ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən ko~u pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~u pajso~u saɬ~ɮama sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~unini a isiŋan saka, ʦi waŋ ʦinħə aʦi siə wəi isiŋan ko~u minəŋnəŋaj to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan na mimisitapaŋ ko~u paisiŋ a pataɬ~ɮo~u, ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən, ʦi waŋ ʦinħə aʦi siə wəi pakajni to~u saki ʡajawaj waʡaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa pipaisiŋan maso~uwaɾ "tiə sanʦiaw" ħan ko~u paŋaŋan ʦaŋraan . ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u waʡaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa pipaisiŋan, pato~uro~uɬ~ɮan ni waŋ ʦinħə isiŋ ʦi so~un ɾiɾiənan, paɬ~ɮama to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj "kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan tajaɾ", saka ira no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj mikarəɬ~ɮ to~u sikaɾ sakaʡo~urip . i **** miħəʦa, miɾaħəʦi ʦiŋra patirəŋ i tajwan to~u ʦajtaŋ ħo~uʦiŋ kristo~ukiw sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj, maɾa o~u sarakataj i tajwan to~u sakaɾəmaɬ~ɮ no~u sjakaj sakapo~ut; to~uja miħəʦaan patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u pato~ukaran pinanaman, paɬ~ɮama to~u sapipaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaw no~u jinʦo~u~umin a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ . i **** miħəʦa, patirəŋ ħaʦa ʦiŋra i wanki no~u sinpisi to~u wanɾi paɾa (aniniaj piħaratəŋan so~un ɾiɾiən paɾa), o~u kasaʡo~upo~uan no~u kaəmaŋaj wawa saki kaʦiħəraŋan pirarakatan. i **** miħəʦa, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ʦiŋra to~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan ni so~un jako~up sinkiwsi (**** miħəʦa mapataj), patirəŋ to~u maro~umro~umaj ro~uma kitakit sinto~ukaj, misatapaŋ saki jinʦo~u~umin no~u tajwan tajra i nanjo~u misintiŋ ato~u kiwiko~u a tajaɾ . i **** miħəʦa, itira ʦiŋra i kaɾiŋko~upatirəŋ to~u paɾo~umaʡan no~u mamaso~ufo~uʦ a ina, kaitiraan no~u sakaŋaʡaj maro~uʡ ato~u miso~ufo~uʦ i ʦaajaj ka ʦiramo~uɬ~ɮ ʦipo~ujapo~ujaj fafaħijan. i **** miħəʦa, i katajaɾan ħo~u niŋra a mapataj, maɾakapo~ut to~u faʡinaj ʦi so~un jako~up fo~uksian maɾəɬ~ɮaʡ itira i tajwan sinkako~ujin, o~uja sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj o~u kaɬ~ɮafo~u ʦi taŋ ħo~u~uanan fo~uksi sinkiwsi ato~u wawa to~u fafaħija ʦi maɾian ko~u miʦaɬ~ɮaaj . ɾaɾo~umaʡan wawa to~u fafaħijan: maɾian (mariɾjn ro~u~utħ tank,****/**/**-****/**/** ), maso~ufo~uʦ i tajpi, saka to~usa a wawa . naħani maɾaʡaʡisiɬ~ɮan ko~u mama ʦi so~un jako~up i tajpi sinkakko~u itija, kaəmaŋan ħo~u maro~uʡ i tanso~u~ui, so~u~uaŋɾiən no~u tajpi a kaitiraan . i **** miħəʦa kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u saka * maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ to~u mato~uʡasaj mino~ukaj tajra i amiɾika, itira to~u miɾaħəʦi misawaɬ~ɮ to~u kawʦo~uŋ ato~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u . i **** miħəʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ i wħəato~un kako~ujin ʦi maɾian to~uja miħəʦa mino~ukaj tajni tajpi, miɬ~ɮama to~u ina ʦi so~un ɾiɾiənan i sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj pataɬ~ɮo~u to~u tajaɾ . kaɾiŋko~u, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sapaɾo~uma kikaiŋkaj i kaɾiŋko~u pataɬ~ɮo~u to~u tajaɾ ʦaŋra mararamo~uɬ~ɮ, ħaɾo~u sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj "maɾija paso~ufo~uʦan", "ħajkikako~u piŋaʡajan", "paɬ~ɮamaaj ina kakko~u", "kaŋko~ukfo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan", "pinanaman kamaro~uʡan", miʦo~uwat i kaɾiŋko~u kristo~u kiw kiwkaj . i **** miħəʦa mapataj ʦi so~un ɾiɾiən, o~u faʡinaj ʦi taŋ ħo~u~uanan fo~uksi to~u ko~u mirəpətaj saka * kakəriɬ~ɮan, ħatato~usa sa a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj a tajaɾ . i **** miħəʦa misawaɬ~ɮ ʦi maɾian nai sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj, maɾakapo~ut to~u faʡinaj mino~ukaj tajra i amiɾika. nawħani maħiratəŋ ko~u tajwan saka, i ʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦa kinapinapina misatiko~utiko~u tajni tajwan miɬ~ɮama to~u sapaɾo~uma kikiŋkaj to~u pataɬ~ɮo~u a tajaɾ, itira i ʦħiʦa*o~u ko~u aro~uʡ imatrini . pinəŋnəŋan *****,<***(ɾiɾɾianr.ɬ~ɮiʦkso~un)********(tħəmo~u~ustarɬ~ɮsəəɬ~ɮ,inʦ.****-)>, ,****.
